1.description: get Trondheim municipality boundary and kommunenummer

2.description: get highest risk class identifier for quick-clay

3.description: get quick-clay hazard polygons filtered by highest risk class and Trondheim municipality extent

4.description: get buildings in Trondheim municipality that intersect quick-clay hazard polygons

5.description: compute centroid of Trondheim municipality boundary

6.description: calculate distance from each intersecting building to municipality centroid

7.description: collapse to one row per building with minimum distance

8.description: sort buildings by distance ascending, then by building ID ascending for tie-breaker
